entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_completed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminder_time` INTEGER, `reminder_repeat` TEXT, `reminder_settings` TEXT, `reminder_location` TEXT, `category_id` TEXT, `is_deleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `deleted_at` INTEGER, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `attachments` TEXT, `calendar_event_id` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `skin_id` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'classic', `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `format` TEXT NOT NULL, `tags` TEXT, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `attachments` TEXT, `category_id` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `target_date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_lunar` INTEGER NOT NULL, `repeat_type` INTEGER NOT NULL, `repeat_interval` INTEGER NOT NULL, `category` INTEGER NOT NULL, `event_type` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminder_settings` TEXT, `shared_with` TEXT, `shared_id` TEXT, `background_uri` TEXT, `reminder_time` INTEGER, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `calendar_event_id` INTEGER, `is_deleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `deleted_at` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `username` TEXT NOT NULL, `password_hash` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_pro` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pro_expire_date` INTEGER, `membership_level` INTEGER NOT NULL, `avatar_uri` TEXT, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `amount` REAL NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `note` TEXT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `image_uri` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_default` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `mood` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weather` INTEGER NOT NULL, `images` TEXT NOT NULL, `videos` TEXT NOT NULL, `audios` TEXT NOT NULL, `documents` TEXT NOT NULL, `location` TEXT, `tags` TEXT NOT NULL, `template_id` TEXT, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminder_time` INTEGER, `is_deleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `deleted_at` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `mood` INTEGER, `weather` INTEGER, `tags` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_system` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_default` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_system` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sort_order` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `amount` REAL NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `start_date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `end_date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_active` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `images` TEXT NOT NULL, `videos` TEXT NOT NULL, `audios` TEXT NOT NULL, `openTime` INTEGER NOT NULL, `triggerCondition` TEXT NOT NULL, `sharedWith` TEXT NOT NULL, `isOpened` INTEGER NOT NULL, `openedAt` INTEGER, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `location` TEXT NOT NULL, `startDate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endDate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `images` TEXT NOT NULL, `diary` TEXT NOT NULL, `tags` TEXT NOT NULL, `latitude` REAL, `longitude` REAL, `trackPoints` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `password_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `card_number` TEXT NOT NULL, `cvv` TEXT NOT NULL, `expiry_date` TEXT NOT NULL, `pin` TEXT NOT NULL, `bank_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `card_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `username` TEXT NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `course_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `teacher` TEXT NOT NULL, `day_of_week` INTEGER NOT NULL, `start_time` TEXT NOT NULL, `end_time` TEXT NOT NULL, `location` TEXT NOT NULL, `week_range` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `package_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `time` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_spam` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `package_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `app_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `action` TEXT NOT NULL, `keywords` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `tree_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `total_minutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `forest_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `tree_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `duration_minutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_withered` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `position_x` INTEGER NOT NULL, `position_y` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `difficulty` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reward_points` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_active` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `challenge_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_completed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completed_at` INTEGER, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `date` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `requirement` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reward_points` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `achievement_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_unlocked` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_worn` INTEGER NOT NULL, `progress` INTEGER NOT NULL, `unlocked_at` INTEGER, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `points` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`user_id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `user_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `item_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `item_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `price` INTEGER NOT NULL, `purchase_time` INTEGER NOT NULL, `activation_code` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
